modules.name: 肺泡巨噬细胞

modules.name: 哮喘
keywords: asthma[Title/Abstract] NOT ( "lung cancer"[Title/Abstract] OR NSCLC[Title/Abstract] OR carcinoma[Title/Abstract] ) AND ( "Nature"[Journal] OR "Science"[Journal] OR "Cell"[Journal] OR "Nat Immunol"[Journal] OR "Nat Med"[Journal] OR "Nat Cell Biol"[Journal] OR "Nat Commun"[Journal] OR "Nat Rev Immunol"[Journal] OR "Nat Microbiol"[Journal] OR "Nat Genet"[Journal] OR "Nat Metab"[Journal] OR "Nat Cancer"[Journal] OR "Sci Immunol"[Journal] OR "Sci Transl Med"[Journal] OR "Sci Adv"[Journal] OR "Immunity"[Journal] OR "J Exp Med"[Journal] OR "Am J Respir Crit Care Med"[Journal] OR "Eur Respir J"[Journal] OR "Thorax"[Journal] ) NOT ( review[Publication Type] OR editorial[Publication Type] OR comment[Publication Type] OR letter[Publication Type] OR review[Title] OR editorial[Title] OR comment[Title] OR meeting[Title] OR republished[Title] OR correction[Title] OR erratum[Title] OR retraction[Title] )
